closed_loop_result.failed_reason: close has 0.0067 missing rate (2 rows); close is a core price field required by return features and the label
closed_loop_result.one_line: initial 300 rows -> Critic failed (close missing 2 rows) -> Repair removed 2 rows -> 298 rows -> re-run Critic passed_with_warnings; label label_next_5d kept out of approved features

pipeline_stages.name: Data Profiler
pipeline_stages.role: 剖析原始表：schema/dtype/缺失/日期/代码/重复/异常 + 跨表发现

pipeline_stages.name: Workflow Planner
pipeline_stages.role: 读 profile + analysis_goal，生成有序可执行可校验的数据准备计划

pipeline_stages.name: Code Executor
pipeline_stages.role: 按 plan 用 pandas 真正执行，产出 analysis-ready 宽表（防未来函数）

pipeline_stages.name: Validity Critic
pipeline_stages.role: 对 panel 做有效性审查（未来函数/label leakage/announce_date 对齐/时间切分）

pipeline_stages.name: Remediation / Repair Loop
pipeline_stages.role: 读 Critic failed 项，生成可解释修复方案并执行，输出 repaired panel

pipeline_stages.name: Re-run Critic (closed-loop verification)
pipeline_stages.role: 对 repaired panel 重新运行 Critic，确认 failed 已解决

schema_inconsistencies.note: date fields have different names but likely same semantics
security id fields have different names but likely same semantics
financial data has announcement lag; report_date is NOT the available-as-of date

global_potential_issues: fundamentals.csv has both report_date and announce_date; use announce_date (not report_date) as the available-as-of date to avoid look-ahead bias
calendar.csv can be used as the trading-day alignment reference (is_trading_day flag)
price.csv and volume.csv may have non-overlapping (date, ticker) keys; verify coverage before joining

plan_summary.analysis_goal: 构建一个用于 5 日收益率预测或因子分析的股票/ETF 日频建模宽表。要求每一行是 ticker-date，特征只能使用当前日期及之前可获得的信息，生成 return_1d、return_5d、volatility_20d、turnover_20d、pe、pb、roe、industry 等字段，标签为未来 5 日收益率 label_next_5d，并检查是否存在未来函数或数据泄漏。

label.name: label_next_5d
label.definition: 未来 5 日收益率 = close.shift(-5)/close - 1，按 ticker 分组
label.usage: label only; must be excluded from feature columns

limitations: Report Generator is a deterministic baseline; no LLM is called.
It only reads prior-stage artifacts; it does not re-run any stage.
No model is trained; no investment advice is produced.
Only simulated sample data is used, not real broker data.
